headline: Best sci fi picks to stream when you want something better than another lazy scroll
primary_keyword: best sci fi picks to stream
meta_description: Need better sci fi picks for tonight? Here are the titles actually worth starting first, without the usual generic streaming-list fluff.
subtitle: Featuring stranger things 5, war machine 2026, and The Matrix — plus more sci fi picks that deserve real attention.

hero_image.title: Best sci fi picks to stream when you want something better than another lazy scroll
hero_image.subtitle: Featuring stranger things 5, war machine 2026, and The Matrix — plus more sci fi picks that deserve real attention.

selected_titles.title: stranger things 5
selected_titles.description: The final battle as Hawkins faces its darkest threat from the Upside Down.

selected_titles.title: war machine 2026
selected_titles.description: A futuristic war epic exploring advanced military tech, power struggles, and global conflict.

selected_titles.title: The Matrix
selected_titles.description: A computer hacker discovers that reality as he knows it is actually a simulated world controlled by machines, and joins a rebellion to free humanity.

selected_titles.title: the terminator
selected_titles.description: A human soldier is sent from 2029 to 1984 to stop an almost indestructible cyborg killing machine, sent from the same year, which has been programmed to execute a young woman whose unborn son is the key to humanity's future salvation.

selected_titles.title: avatater: the way if water
selected_titles.description: Jake Sully explores Pandora oceans while protecting his family from new dangers.

cta.headline: Want a custom watchlist instead of generic streaming lists?
cta.body: Message MovieJam on WhatsApp and get 3 tailored picks based on your mood, genre, and how much brainpower you want to spend tonight.

internal_link_defaults.title: How to get custom movie recs on WhatsApp
Why endless scrolling ruins movie night

style_rules: Lead with a viral, opinionated hook in the first paragraph.
Keep the same vibe as the existing MyMovieJam blog: sharp, audience-first, clean, punchy, and honest.
Write like a real viewer, not a neutral encyclopedia.
Do not fake plot details, awards, or availability.
If the CSV data is thin, make the opinion narrower instead of inventing facts.
Use the MyMovieJam visual theme and CTA style already present on the site.
SEO first, but never at the cost of sounding robotic.
Use clear subheads, quick picks, FAQs, and a strong WhatsApp CTA.
notes_for_writer: Tell the truth if the list mixes films and series.
Write as a sharp viewer with taste, not a neutral database.
Pick clear winners, easy starters, and mood-based recommendations.
Use a clear WhatsApp CTA at the end.
